name: Apptentive
description: Apptentive — mobile customer engagement platform focused on in-app surveys, ratings prompts, and message center (now Alchemer Mobile).

seo.title: Apptentive — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Apptentive: Apptentive — mobile customer engagement platform focused on in-app surveys, ratings prompts, and message center (now Alchemer Mobile).

when_to_use: Triggering in-app review prompts at optimal moments for App Store ratings
Running NPS surveys within mobile apps tied to user behavior events
Collecting in-app feedback via message center for support deflection
Segmenting survey delivery by user lifecycle stage and engagement level

pros: Strong in-app survey and ratings prompt targeting
Message Center gives two-way support channel
Sentiment tracking tied to app store reviews
Mobile-first SDK with solid iOS/Android parity
cons: Rebrand to Alchemer Mobile caused doc fragmentation
Pricing is sales-gated with no public tiers
Focused narrowly on mobile — no web parity
Dashboards feel dated versus modern CDPs
review.verdict: Solid mobile feedback tool if ratings and in-app surveys are the core need, but narrow beyond that.
review.best_for: Consumer mobile teams driving app store ratings and NPS at scale
review.not_for: Web-first products or teams needing push orchestration and journeys
